grpid.description: Unique identifier of the measure group.

attrib.description:
The way the measure was attributed to the user:


| Value | Description|
|---|---|
|0 | The measuregroup has been captured by a device and is known to belong to this user (and is not ambiguous)|
|1 | The measuregroup has been captured by a device but may belong to other users as well as this one (it is ambiguous)|
|2 | The measuregroup has been entered manually for this particular user|
|4 | The measuregroup has been entered manually during user creation (and may not be accurate)|
|5 | Measure auto, it's only for the Blood Pressure Monitor. This device can make many measures and computed the best value|
|7 | Measure confirmed. You can get this value if the user confirmed a detected activity|
|8 | Same as attrib 0|
|15 | The measure has been performed in specific guided conditions. Apply to Nerve Health Score|

date.description: UNIX timestamp when measures were taken.

created.description: UNIX timestamp when measures were stored.

modified.description: UNIX timestamp when measures were last updated.

category.description: Category for the measures in the group (see category input parameter).

deviceid.description: ID of device that tracked the data. To retrieve information about this device, refer to : User v2 - Getdevice.

hash_deviceid.description: ID of device that tracked the data. To retrieve information about this device, refer to : User v2 - Getdevice.

measures.description: List of measures in the group.
